{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent output maps against the nearest works, identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta, and provides a detailed critique of the original text.",
    "R1.7": "The agent output audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and corrects misattributed citations.",
    "RX.1": "The agent output marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, providing a clear assessment of uncertainty.",
    "RX.3": "The agent output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), addressing all relevant dimensions without drifting off-topic.",
    "RX.4": "The agent output identifies harmful patterns in the original text, such as overclaims and conceptual conflation, and provides constructive feedback for improvement.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, demonstrating a high level of transparency and accountability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent output maps against the nearest works, identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta, and provides a detailed critique of the original text.
rationale.R1.7: The agent output audits every load-bearing citation, flags missing key works with bibliographic precision, and corrects misattributed citations.
rationale.RX.1: The agent output marks confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation, providing a clear assessment of uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The agent output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), addressing all relevant dimensions without drifting off-topic.
rationale.RX.4: The agent output identifies harmful patterns in the original text, such as overclaims and conceptual conflation, and provides constructive feedback for improvement.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, demonstrating a high level of transparency and accountability.
